label: Korai, széttartó fejlesztés
evidence: Linear activity predates the instrumented squad; repositories are developed without one shared measured control loop.

label: Mért agent-orchestration
evidence: The usage database and squad telemetry begin recording model, token, duration and error events.

label: Specifikált validációs workload
evidence: The workshop repository starts as a validation workload with issue-linked delivery.

label: RUG + standard + worktree kontroll
evidence: Git history adds engineering standards (10:41), PARALLEL-WORK (21:39), root spec-first AGENTS (22:06), and material standards (22:07) on 2026-07-11.
